text: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D32 Mission Report Syria October 2024

transcript_title: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D32 Mission Report Syria October 2024
text: AT 0823Z, TOOK OFF FROM OJMS VIA SLR. PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING. AT 0649Z, WAS 7-LINED. ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 1102Z AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 37S FV 85 81 (SEE ISR 1). AT 1158Z, WAS 7-LINED. ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 1230Z AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 37S FU 36 79 (SEE ISR 2). AT 1559Z, OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED ARRIEAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 2252Z, WAS 7-LINED. ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 2318Z AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 37S FU 85 81 (SEE ISR 3). AT 0124Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0447Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OJMS. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:24 MISSION HOURS, 14:22 FMV HOURS, 3X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 13:02 SIGINT HOURS, 3X SIGINT TASKINGS.
